description: A compute environment that runs MCP servers. May be a desktop, browser, mobile device, embedded hardware, remote server, or the integrated Agience Core instance.

platform.description: Runtime environment type. 'integrated' means all servers run in-process within Agience Core.

servers.description: Names of MCP servers registered on this host.

relay_url.description: WebSocket relay URL for non-integrated hosts that connect via the desktop relay. Omitted for platform='integrated'.

authority.description: Reference to the authority artifact this host operates under.
